name: Zucchini Stuffing Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of chicken soup
4 medium Zucchini, cut into 2 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook zucchini in a little boiling water until tender. Drain.
2. Saute carrots and onions in 4 tablespoons butter until tender.
3. Remove from heat, stir in 1-1/2 cups stuffing cubes, soup, and sour cream.
4. Gently stir in zucchini slices.
5. Turn into a casserole dish.
6. Melt remaining butter and combine with remaining stuffing cubes.
7. Toss lightly and spoon onto top of casserole.
8. Bake uncovered for 30-40 minutes at 350 degrees. Serves 6-8.
